title: epipactis minor
intro: Epipactis minor, also known as marsh helleborine, is a type of orchid that grows in moist environments and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Epipactis minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a popular herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Epipactis minor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
